This is the weekly visible open thread. Post about anything you want, ask random questions, whatever. ACX has an unofficial subreddit [ https://substack.com/redirect/989c1cac-d56a-407d-b259-7546975cf988?r=8o54n ], Discord [ https://substack.com/redirect/dd15472a-827e-4ab7-9af7-458cf91dbdb8?r=8o54n ], and bulletin board [ https://substack.com/redirect/fb4b23a1-7b32-45c5-8571-6fcb1f7c3079?r=8o54n ], and in-person meetups around the world [ https://substack.com/redirect/43ecdf70-daa6-4aa5-8d0c-7313e7f2e252?r=8o54n ]. 95% of content is free, but for the remaining 5% you can subscribe here [ https://substack.com/redirect/6a429f89-b1b0-4b18-b5cc-03b6da1df218?r=8o54n ]. In this week’s news:
1: Quantified Uncertainty Research Institute [ https://substack.com/redirect/db18bf06-6957-4bcf-9f2f-355af0bbee55?r=8o54n ] (forecasting, prediction markets, etc) is hiring a product manager, software engineer, and programming language engineer, see their webpage for details [ https://substack.com/redirect/f1f719db-fd08-4248-9592-fb4791234bb5?r=8o54n ].
2: Worldwide ACX meetup season continues. This week there will be meetups in Singapore on Tuesday, Portland on Friday, Boston and Vienna on Saturday, NYC and Baltimore and Miami on Sunday - plus many more. See the meetups list [ https://substack.com/redirect/ba8f7593-4b13-4070-8e2e-982fd6b8fa90?r=8o54n ] for details.
